Normal: Toi muon mua mot cuon sach.
NeedAdvice: Ban oi, toi dang can tu van...
Ban co the giup toi khong?
Toi khong biet nen chon cuon nao...
Special: ...Toi dang tim thu gi do dac biet.
Ho noi o day co the tim duoc thu toi can.
Toi da nghe tieng ve noi nay.

Crime: Toi thich nhung cau chuyen doi hoi tri suy luan.
Phai co bi an, co manh moi an giau dau do.
Cai gi do khien toi phai nghi nhieu, can tim ra su that.
Drama: Gi do cham den cam xuc, sau sac mot chut.
Cau chuyen ve con nguoi va moi quan he.
Toi muon khoc duoc, cuoi duoc trong cung mot cuon sach.
Fact: Toi muon hoc them dieu gi do moi.
Kien thuc thuc te, khong can hu cau.
Cai gi do mo rong hieu biet cua toi ve the gioi.
Fantasy: Vung dat xa xoi, phep thuat, dieu huyen bi.
Thu gi do khien toi thoat khoi thuc tai.
Nhung sinh vat ky la, nhung the gioi chua ai kham pha.
Classic: Nhung tac pham da vuot qua thoi gian.
Cai gi do co chieu sau, da duoc kiem chung.
Van chuong co dien, loai ma nguoi ta van nhac den sau hang tram nam.
Kids: Cho con toi, cai gi nhe nhang, vui ve.
Truyen tranh hoac truyen ngan cho tre em.
Con toi thich dong vat va thien nhien.
Travel: Toi muon di den noi nao do du chi qua trang sach.
Kham pha the gioi ma chua can roi ghe.
Nhung vung dat la, phong tuc khac biet, hanh trinh dai.

accept: Dung roi! Cam on ban rat nhieu!
Chinh xac! Ban that su hieu toi.
reject: Hmm, khong phai thu toi dang tim.
Tiec qua, khong phu hop lam voi toi.

NeedAdvice: Cam on ban da tu van!
Toi se doc ngay toi nay.
Special: Hay giu thu nay. Nhu mot loi cam on.
